mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prd_document ( project_id, version_name, file_name, original_file_name, file_path, file_type, file_size, parse_status, index_status, parsed_content, content_hash, description, error_message, deleted, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{versionName}, #{fileName}, #{originalFileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{parseStatus}, #{indexStatus}, #{parsedContent}, #{contentHash}, #{description}, #{errorMessage}, false, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, version_name, file_name, original_file_name, file_path, file_type, file_size, parse_status, index_status, parsed_content, content_hash, description, error_message, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM prd_document WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE prd_document SET parse_status = #{parseStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE prd_document SET parse_status = #{parseStatus}, parsed_content = #{parsedContent}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE prd_document SET index_status = #{indexStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE prd_document SET deleted = true, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
